{"action": "tool", "tool": "file_write", "arguments": {"path": "recommendation.md", "content": "# Recommendation: open-source vector databases

**Recommendation: Qdrant** — highest GitHub traction (24k stars [1]) and strong filtered search. Chroma (21k stars [2]) is the pick when embedding directly in a Python app; Weaviate (13k stars [3]) when hybrid search matters most.

## Sources
1. https://github.com/qdrant/qdrant
2. https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma
3. https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate
"}}
